name: Namco
description: Japanese arcade and console developer behind Pac-Man, Galaga, Ridge Racer, Tekken, and many arcade classics.

eras.title: Electromechanical and Arcade Origins
eras.description: Early amusement-machine period leading into video arcade success.

eras.title: Arcade Golden Age
eras.description: Pac-Man, Galaga, Dig Dug, and Namco's defining arcade identity.

eras.title: 3D Arcade and PlayStation Era
eras.description: Ridge Racer, Tekken, Ace Combat, and the final Namco period before Bandai Namco.

notes: Use this for the historic Namco identity. Modern successor is Bandai Namco.
